summary:
Perfect! The fix is working as expected. When an informer delivers an update that conflicts with an assumed object (version 6 > version 5), the code now sets `conflictNotified = true`, which results in "OK: conflict notified" being printed instead of the "BUG: assumed state silently dropped" message.

The needle has been found and fixed. The problem was in the `informerUpdate` method where it silently dropped the assumed version without notifying anyone. By adding one line (`conflictNotified = true`), we ensure that when such a conflict occurs, it is properly recorded and reported.
